text:
Follow our build-up and text commentary as the USA face Zambia on the first day of women’s football at the Summer Games.

Share

This page is now closed. Thanks for joining us. These were the updates as USA beat Zambia 3-0 at the Paris Olympics 2024 on Thursday, July 24:

title: USA vs Zambia 3-0: Paris Olympics 2024 women’s football – as it happened | Paris Olympics 2024 News | Al Jazeera

description: All our updates as USA beat Zambia on the first day of women’s football at the Summer Games.
